title: cephalaria transsylvanica
intro: Cephalaria transsylvanica, also known as the Transylvanian cephalaria or goat's beard, is a perennial plant species native to Eastern Europe, particularly in Romania and Ukraine. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cephalaria transsylvanica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
